author: Farcas Antonio Matei
name: SP8192 ETD Hybrid (3 enc + 3x3 think + 4 dec) + Int5 GPTQ + MuonEqR + U-Net
blurb: Hybrid Encode-Think-Decode transformer: 3 unique encoder layers, 3 shared think layers looped x3, 4 unique decoder layers, with U-Net skips. SP8192 BPE, 33M params, GPTQ int5 matrices + int8 embeddings + Brotli-11. Single-seed 8xH100 run reaches 1.1169 BPB at 15.87 MB without TTT or seed selection.
